## Verification

- [ ] I wrote or updated tests before or alongside the production change.
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes locally for the changed scope.
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .` passes locally.
- [ ] `python -m mypy` passes locally.
- [ ] The 90% coverage gate passes in CI or via `make coverage`.
- [ ] I updated docs in lockstep where behavior, setup, or scope changed.
